title: KFRI Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Assistant posts
description: Kerala Forest Research Institute (KFRI) has issued an official notification for the recruitment of various Project Assistant Positions. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the KFRI Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here i...
